name: Password Generator
description: This component generates a password and allows you to copy it to your clipboard. It also supports some password conditions that you will have to check.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Primary authored content. Follow the sidekick block page for the exact table/content shape and examples.

usageNotes: Content wise the block is split into three rows. One first row should contain a title (h1 element). One row will be split into two columns. The first column will contain the generator part and the other will contain the copy button (link of #copy-password ). One row should contain the privacy policy. Component specific tags:
<password-generator> - this tag should be put in the first row of any column
strong-weak-text - you can insert this text in order to flag where the strenght of the generated password will be displayed followed by 4 texts split by a comma
<privacy-policy> - flags the row that contains the privacy policy
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
